creator.name: Sukarna Jana
creator.handle: A robotics bee who keeps buzzing
creator.tagline: I keep experimenting, in the hope that one of them clicks for humanity.
creator.note: Every rupee goes into parts, boards, hosting and hardware. Nothing else.
creator.promise: Every rupee you send is seed money. It buys the part, the board or the hour of bench time that turns an idea into something working. If one of these ever grows into something that matters, I will know exactly who paid for the first version of it, and I will say so.

projects.title: Swarm robotics testbed
projects.description: Twelve small differential drive robots that coordinate without a central controller. Open firmware, printable chassis.
projects.goal_for: Motor drivers, IMUs and a year of bench time
projects.image_alt: Two small wheeled robots on a workbench

projects.title: Low cost soil sensor node
projects.description: A solar LoRa node that reports soil moisture from fields with no mobile coverage. Built to survive a Bengal monsoon.
projects.goal_for: Weatherproof enclosures and the first field trial
projects.image_alt: A farmer working a flooded paddy field in Kerala

projects.title: Refreshable braille pad
projects.description: A single line braille display built from piezo actuators, aiming at a tenth of the usual price.
projects.goal_for: Piezo bender stock and a working prototype
projects.image_alt: Hands reading a refreshable braille display

projects.title: Desktop robotic arm, version two
projects.description: Five axis arm with harmonic drives, sourced entirely from Indian suppliers. Documentation in Hindi and Bengali too.
projects.goal_for: Machined parts for the first ten units
projects.image_alt: Close up of a white robotic arm and hand
